author: mxs_
content: Were there discussions somewhere on EIP 8061 and its potential impact on the entry queue? Worried that it will increase the entry queue pressure as ETF and such likely have risk models that take their exit time into account, so the shorter, the more they can stake for the same risk.

content: all i can suggest is reading the resources above and raising concerns if missing. im not fully following along, otherwise committed at the moment
